## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance reports, and content audit summary.](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strong growth in organic traffic and conversions, with AI roleplay page performing exceptionally well](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [12 articles identified for merging to optimize SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Plans to implement interactive elements (e.g., CTAs, product screenshots) in blog posts, pending engineering capacity](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [New content strategy directions discussed, including LMS comparisons and AI roleplay platform comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline and Quality Improvements

  - [3 content refreshes and 2 new content pieces in progress](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Suggestion to include mild CTAs and product screenshots across content for variety](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Plans to implement roleplay preview embeds in blog posts, requiring custom engineering work](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Process for content creation involves editing by content manager, followed by Jo's review for search intent and structure](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

### Performance Reports

  - [Significant growth in sessions and engaged sessions across learn pages](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Strong increase in first-position rankings for non-branded queries (75 to 191)](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [AI roleplay page is second-highest converting page after homepage](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Blog content contributing heavily to LLM traffic and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Content Audit Summary

  - [12 articles identified for merging with better-performing options to avoid keyword cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [47 articles marked for refreshing, prioritized based on content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [36 404 errors identified, needing redirects to improve user experience and SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)

### New Content Strategy Directions

  - [Exploring content around Learning Management Systems (LMS) to leverage integration capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
  - [Prioritizing AI roleplay platform comparisons over LMS comparisons due to higher conversion potential](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
  - [Discussion on creating in-house landing pages for direct competitor comparisons (e.g., Hyperbound)](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Garrett to review and provide feedback on new content pieces and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Sean and Garrett to schedule time to implement redirects for 12 merged articles](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Team to address 36 404 errors with appropriate redirects](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [Exec team to create in-house landing pages for competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
  - [Jo to grant access to Looker dashboards for Exec team to view and edit reports](https://fathom.video/share/xKjfsbBEaxtq82Rs4yPx8UjsM5PxMd6j?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
